note:
{
  "experiment_overview": "The experiment involves Agrobacterium tumefaciens-mediated genetic engineering of green microalgae, Chlorella vulgaris. The goal is to prepare electrocompetent Agrobacterium cultures for microalgal genetic engineering.",
  "procedures_observed": [
    "Prepare LB broth containing 15 mM glucose, 20 mg/L Rifampicin, and 50 mg/L Kanamycin.",
    "Incubate the mixture until OD600 reaches 1.",
    "Transfer the culture to TAP agar (20 mg/L Tetracycline) and incubate until colonies form.",
    "Perform PCR using AGL1+pCAMBA1302 plasmid DNA as a template."
  ],

    "Microscope for PCR analysis"
  ],

    "PCR cycle number"
  ],

    "From transferring the culture to performing PCR"
  ],
